extDesc.message: Sniff website frameworks, libraries, servers, and optional remote technology API results.

extIntroductionWebFramework.message: Web Framework: WordPress, phpBB, Drupal, MediaWiki, codeigniter ...

extIntroductionWebSever.message: Web Server: PHP, Apache, nginx, IIS ...

remoteDetectorOptionsIntro.message: Optional lookup through free technology APIs. Target categories include JavaScript frameworks, CDN, security, payment processors, font scripts, JavaScript libraries, web frameworks, UI frameworks, and programming languages.

remoteDetectorMissingKey.message: Configure the selected free API key in Options first.

remoteDetectorUnsupportedUrl.message: Only HTTP and HTTPS pages can be queried.

extIntroductionNotice.message: Developers always like to hide something, so there may be a miscarriage of justice.
